ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the rugby team */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the division the team is part of */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the team belongs to */,
  "team_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the team was created */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Short description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the division is part of */,
  "division_description" TEXT /* Short description of the division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Short description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team playing */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team playing */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date when the match was played */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the venue where the match was held */,
  "match_result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators attending the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of spectators the venue can hold */,
  "venue_description" TEXT /* Short description of the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match result */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played by the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the team */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws by the team */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Number of goals conceded by the team */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Goal difference for the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points accumulated by the team */,
  "bonus_points" INTEGER /* Bonus points awarded to the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player is part of */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's statistics entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Number of points scored by the player */,
  "tries" INTEGER /* Number of tries scored by the player */,
  "conversions" INTEGER /* Number of conversions made by the player */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Number of penalties scored by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, manager, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scheduled match */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the first team playing */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the second team playing */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date when the match is scheduled */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the venue where the match will be held */,
  "kickoff_time" TEXT /* Time when the match will kick off */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who got injured */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., concussion, sprain) */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date when the injury occurred */,
  "expected_recovery_date" TEXT /* Date when the player is expected to recover */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who got transferred */,
  "old_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the old team of the player */,
  "new_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the new team of the player */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date when the transfer occurred */,
  "transfer_fee" TEXT /* Transfer fee for the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_old_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("old_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_new_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("new_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match the video is about */,
  "video_type" TEXT /* Type of video (e.g., match analysis, training session) */,
  "video_date" TEXT /* Date when the video was uploaded */,
  "video_description" TEXT /* Short description of the video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_videos_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis entry */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the video the analysis is about */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., technical, tactical) */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was made */,
  "analysis_description" TEXT /* Short description of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)
